General.Name: Adamas One Corp. Common Stock
General.Description: Adamas One Corp., a diamond company, produces single crystal diamonds and diamond materials through CVD process for diamond jewelry industry and industrial markets in the United States and internationally. Adamas One Corp. was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Scottsdale, Arizona.
